title: CompatibilityProperty

localizedName.description: The name of the product attribute that as been translated to the language of the site.

name.description: The name of the product attribute, such as Make, Model, Year, etc.

value.description: The value for the name attribute, such as BMW, R1200GS, 2011, etc.

description: This container returns the product attribute name/value pairs that are compatible with the keyword. These attributes are submitted in the compatibility_filter request field.
